Quadrant Analysis — Sales × Location Potential

Stores plotted by Actual Sales (X-axis) and Location Potential (Y-axis based on catchment/POI/competition). Click on a store dot for Category Scorecard popup.

This is one of three complementary lenses, each answering a different question — not competing verdicts: Sales × Location (this view) = is a store capturing its catchment? · Peer-group Stars/Cash Cows (Excel report) = how does it rank vs similar stores? · Intangible (Proven Performer / Structural Laggard) = is performance explained or unexplained? For the single recommended action per store, use Primary Action (Store Scorecard).

Stars - High Sales & High Location Potential (Best performers in prime locations)
Question Marks - Low Sales but High Location Potential (Optimization targets)
Cash Cows - High Sales but Low Location Potential (Overperforming their location)
Problem Stores - Low Sales & Low Location Potential (Consider relocation)

What-if Scenario Analysis

Feature Attribution Analysis

Variables ranked by Hierarchical Category Attribution - showing each variable's contribution (%) to sales. Click category to expand.

💡 Attribution % shows how much each variable contributes to overall sales using the multiplicative Shapley value methodology. Higher values = more impactful variables.
